format_notes: getStartDataForProgram(progData, i, i2, i3) builds the 'begin program' command: 02 + CRC4BE(progData) + len4BE(progData) + 1B(i) + 1B(i2) + 1B(i3), framed (01 + escape(len2BE + body) + 03). Each case gives prog_data_hex (lowercase contiguous hex of progData), i/i2/i3 (sample params: i=index, i2/i3 are device/show-count style fields per the decompiled CLog message wording - exact semantics don't affect this oracle, they're just raw bytes), and output_hex: the single complete framed frame.
